'''âl-v-v''' ('''kalavav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unboil|unboil]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unboil|unboil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-v-v
|-
! Lemma
| kalavav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilavav|thilavav]] || [[word:jilavav|jilavav]] || [[word:shilavav|shilavav]] || [[word:kilavav|kilavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulavav|thuthulavav]] || [[word:jujulavav|jujulavav]] || [[word:shushulavav|shushulavav]] || [[word:kukulavav|kukulavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulavav|thulavav]] || [[word:julavav|julavav]] || [[word:shulavav|shulavav]] || [[word:kulavav|kulavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulavav|thulavav]] || [[word:julavav|julavav]] || [[word:shulavav|shulavav]] || [[word:kulavav|kulavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelavav|thelavav]] || [[word:jelavav|jelavav]] || [[word:shelavav|shelavav]] || [[word:kelavav|kelavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholavav|thotholavav]] || [[word:jojolavav|jojolavav]] || [[word:shosholavav|shosholavav]] || [[word:kokolavav|kokolavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholavav|tholavav]] || [[word:jolavav|jolavav]] || [[word:sholavav|sholavav]] || [[word:kolavav|kolavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholavav|tholavav]] || [[word:jolavav|jolavav]] || [[word:sholavav|sholavav]] || [[word:kolavav|kolavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlavav|thĂŠlavav]] || [[word:jĂŠlavav|jĂŠlavav]] || [[word:shĂŠlavav|shĂŠlavav]] || [[word:kĂŠlavav|kĂŠlavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalavav|thathalavav]] || [[word:jajalavav|jajalavav]] || [[word:shashalavav|shashalavav]] || [[word:kakalavav|kakalavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalavav|thalavav]] || [[word:jalavav|jalavav]] || [[word:shalavav|shalavav]] || [[word:kalavav|kalavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalavav|thalavav]] || [[word:jalavav|jalavav]] || [[word:shalavav|shalavav]] || [[word:kalavav|kalavav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalavav|shalavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalavav|goshalavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalavav|gokishalavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalavavnĂŒ|shalavavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalavavnknĂŒ|goshalavavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalavavnĂŒ|gokishalavavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalavavshĂ«|shalavavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalavavnkshĂ«|goshalavavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalavavshĂ«|gokishalavavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalavavro|shalavavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalavavnkro|goshalavavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalavavro|gokishalavavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalavavmu|shalavavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalavavnkmu|goshalavavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalavavmu|gokishalavavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalavavsher|shalavavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalavavnksher|goshalavavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalavavsher|gokishalavavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalavavng|shalavavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalavavnkng|goshalavavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalavavng|gokishalavavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalavavya|shalavavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalavavnkya|goshalavavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalavavya|gokishalavavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalavavyam|shalavavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalavavnkyam|goshalavavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalavavyam|gokishalavavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalavavnĂŒshĂ«|shalavavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalavavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalavavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalavavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalavavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalavavnĂŒro|shalavavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalavavnknĂŒro|goshalavavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalavavnĂŒro|gokishalavavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalavavnĂŒmu|shalavavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalavavnknĂŒmu|goshalavavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalavavnĂŒmu|gokishalavavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalavavshĂ«nĂŒ|shalavavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalavavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalavavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalavavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalavavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalavavshĂ«ro|shalavavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalavavnkshĂ«ro|goshalavavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalavavshĂ«ro|gokishalavavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalavavshĂ«mu|shalavavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalavavnkshĂ«mu|goshalavavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalavavshĂ«mu|gokishalavavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalavavronĂŒ|shalavavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalavavnkronĂŒ|goshalavavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalavavronĂŒ|gokishalavavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalavavroshĂ«|shalavavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalavavnkroshĂ«|goshalavavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalavavroshĂ«|gokishalavavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalavavromu|shalavavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalavavnkromu|goshalavavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalavavromu|gokishalavavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalavavmunĂŒ|shalavavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalavavnkmunĂŒ|goshalavavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalavavmunĂŒ|gokishalavavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalavavmushĂ«|shalavavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalavavnkmushĂ«|goshalavavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalavavmushĂ«|gokishalavavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalavavmuro|shalavavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalavavnkmuro|goshalavavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalavavmuro|gokishalavavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
